title: Sukudon 4 Pieces shankless Blade Painting Tools Seriously Good Continental Filling Knives (45MM+65MM+85MM+105MM)
features: ➽ High quality:Painting tools forged with high-quality stainless steel, strong and durable, good elasticity, not easy to rust
➽ Extensive use: filling knife can be used in many accasions, such as mixing putty, scraping Loose Putty, filling cracks, filling holes
➽ What you will have: 4 pieces Work filling knife of 4 sizes(45MM+65MM+85MM+105MM)
➽ Feature: filling knife set flexible, corrosion-resistant, spring-tempered steel blade for effective filling and smoothing. Ideal for use with filler, caulk, sealant and putty
➽ Attention: The shankless blade ( filling blades )is a little sharp, so you need to be careful when you use it and keep away from children
description: Product Description Flexible and Durable Filling knife: These putty knives with high-quality stainless steel have a flexible and sturdy blade that can be bent but not broken. It can easily scrape wallpapers, putty and walls. Our reinforced stainless steel putty knives are durable, flexible and efficient . Scientific Blade Bevel : After a lot of experimental tests, these putty knives use the most suitable blade bevel angle, which can improve the effect of use. It can easily flatten the putty or paint without pits and at the same level. Sukudon Seriously Good Continental Filling Knives 4 Pack For Staining or Varnishing those Smaller woodwork areas This Seriously Good Continental Filling Knives pack contains all the filling knives you need for different size filling jobs. The flexible stainless steel blades make it easy to fill different size holes and cracks For use with general purpose filler, fine surface filler and wood filler. Remove all filler from knives after use, wipe clean with a damp cloth then dry with a clean cloth. Contents: 1 x 2in (45mm) 1 x 3in (65mm) 1 x 4in (85mm) 1 x 5in (105mm)

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Mixing and applying putty, scraping old paint or wallpaper, and filling cracks and holes in walls or other surfaces.
